LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT THE CITY OF MODESTO, CITY OF MODESTO SEWER DISTRICT NO.1, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EX REL THE FIRST AMENDED MOTION FOR ORDER TO STAY PROCEEDINGS OR TO STAY DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. TRIAL IN THIS CASE WOULD NECESSARILY ADDRESS THE SAME FACTUAL ISSUES AS THE UNDERLYING ACTION CONCERNING, FOR EXAMPLE, NATURE, TIMING AND RESPONSIBILITY FOR ANY SPILLS. FAIRNESS AND JUDICIAL ECONOMY REQUIRE STAYING THIS ACTION PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE LIABILITY PHACSE IN THE UNDERLYING CASE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING COUNSEL OF HER INTENT TO APPEAR. AS A RESULT THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. First Amended Notice Of Motion For Order To Stay Proceedings Or To Stay Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: COURT CALL APPEARANCE:
Sandra Llaneta, Esq. of Summers & Shives, 858-874-1800 for plaintiff and opposing party Insurance Company of The West.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
DEFENDANT THE CITY OF MODESTO, CITY OF MODESTO SEWER DISTRICT NO.1, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EX REL THE First Amended Notice Of Motion For Order To Stay Proceedings Or To Stay Discovery IS GRANTED. TRIAL IN THIS CASE WOULD NECESSARILY ADDRESS THE SAME FACTUAL ISSUES AS THE UNDERLYING ACTION CONCERNING, FOR EXAMPLE, NATURE, TIMING AND RESPONSIBILITY FOR ANY SPILLS. FAIRNESS AND JUDICIAL ECONOMY REQUIRE STAYING THIS ACTION PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE LIABILITY PHACSE IN THE UNDERLYING CASE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING COUNSEL OF HER INTENT TO APPEAR. AS A RESULT THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR# 8189 (301/BUSCH/AC)
